title: GWI POS Drift Scan
description: Records the result of a periodic drift scan comparing observed node state against the applied baseline/policy. Written by the drift scanner timer (runs every 30 minutes). Lives at /opt/gwi-pos/state/drift-scan.json. Drifted items are classified using the deprecation taxonomy codes. Example: {"schema_version":"1.0","producer":"drift-scanner","generated_at":"2026-03-20T15:00:00Z","node_id":"nuc-venue-001","baseline_version":"baseline-2026.03.20.1","drift_detected":true,"drifted_items":["FIREWALL_DISABLED","SLEEP_TARGETS_UNMASKED"],"config_checksums":{"ufw_rules":"sha256:abc123","sshd_config":"sha256:def456"},"clock":{"synced":true,"offset_ms":1.2}}

producer.description: Name of the script that wrote this file.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this scan completed.

node_id.description: Unique node identifier from SERVER_NODE_ID in .env.

drift_detected.description: True if any drifted items were found.

items.description: Deprecation taxonomy code identifying the drift. See the deprecation taxonomy in the spec for the full list of codes and their severity/remediation mode.

drifted_items.description: List of deprecation codes for detected drift. Empty array if no drift. Codes include: APP_VERSION_OLD, BASELINE_VERSION_OLD, POLICY_VERSION_OLD, OS_VERSION_UNSUPPORTED, SERVICE_SET_MISMATCH, FIREWALL_DISABLED, SLEEP_TARGETS_UNMASKED, CLOCK_UNSYNCED, TIME_SOURCE_UNHEALTHY, DESKTOP_ENV_UNSUPPORTED, PRINTER_MODEL_UNCERTIFIED, HARDWARE_PROFILE_UNKNOWN.

config_checksums.description: SHA-256 checksums of key config files for change detection between scans.

clock.description: Clock health at scan time. Must always be reported per Rule 12 (never suppressed).

synced.description: True if chrony reports normal leap status. False if chrony is unavailable or unhealthy.

offset_ms.description: System clock offset from NTP source in milliseconds. Null if chrony is unavailable.
